hero.eyebrow: Florida Top 1 Driving School · Online driving education platform
hero.title: Florida's Bilingual Online Driving School Platform
hero.subtitle: A modern platform being built for Florida drivers — with permit prep, learning paths, progress tracking, and support in English and Spanish.

problem.title: Florida drivers shouldn't have to guess what comes next.
problem.body: Many first-time drivers, parents, and Spanish-speaking users face confusion around course requirements, permit preparation, ticket education, and next steps. Florida Top 1 Driving School is being built to bring that process into one organized digital platform.

cards.title: First-Time Drivers
cards.body: A large, recurring market that needs a clear starting point, a course path, and permit preparation.

cards.title: Parents of Teen Drivers
cards.body: Families who want a guided, trackable path through permit, practice, and license steps.

cards.title: Spanish-Speaking Drivers
cards.body: An underserved segment that needs a true bilingual experience — not a translated afterthought.

cards.title: Drivers With Tickets
cards.body: Recurring demand for structured traffic-school and ticket-education guidance.

finder.heading: A guided enrollment experience for every driver type.
finder.body: The platform is designed to identify each user's situation — first-time driver, teen permit, Spanish-speaking applicant, ticket education, or permit prep — and guide them into the right learning path.

services.heading: Platform Capabilities
services.title: One platform for the most common Florida driver journeys.
services.subheading: Florida Top 1 Driving School is being built as a complete digital experience for driving education, preparation, bilingual support, and student progress.

items.title: Online Course Delivery
items.body: Structured digital learning paths designed for Florida driving education.

items.title: Permit Test Preparation
items.body: Practice tools and study support for Florida permit readiness.

items.title: Bilingual Student Support
items.body: English and Spanish guidance built into the core user experience.

items.title: Teen Driver Pathways
items.body: Guided flows for parents and teens preparing for the permit process.

items.title: Ticket Education Support
items.body: A structured experience for drivers who need traffic-school related education.

items.title: Progress Tracking Dashboard
items.body: A future student dashboard for lessons, completion status, support, and next steps.

packages.heading: Driver Pathways We Are Building
packages.subheading: Each pathway is a guided journey — from first contact to DMV-ready — tailored to a specific Florida driver type.

howItWorks.heading: How the platform works
howItWorks.step1Body: Each driver starts from their situation — first-time, teen, ticket, or Spanish-speaking — to enter the right pathway.
howItWorks.step2Body: The platform matches each profile to the right path: online education, permit prep, and bilingual support.
howItWorks.step3Body: Move through lessons, track progress, and get DMV-ready with bilingual support along the way.

whyUs.heading: Why this platform can win
whyUs.subheading: A Florida-first, bilingual, digital-first model built to scale.

cards.title: Florida-focused from day one
cards.body: Built around the needs of Florida drivers, families, and first-time applicants.

cards.title: Bilingual by design
cards.body: English and Spanish support are part of the core experience, not an afterthought.

cards.title: One organized journey
cards.body: Courses, prep, support, and progress tracking live in one guided flow.

cards.title: Built for scale
cards.body: The platform can expand from West Palm Beach to statewide digital education.

investorHighlights.heading: What the demo shows
investorHighlights.subheading: A first look at the experience, the model, and where the platform is going.

items.title: Digital-first experience
items.body: A modern, mobile-first driving school experience built for online delivery.

items.title: Bilingual user journey
items.body: An English / Spanish experience designed for an underserved Florida market.

items.title: Course finder & enrollment
items.body: A guided flow that routes each driver type into the right pathway.

items.title: Progress-tracking roadmap
items.body: A planned student dashboard for lessons, completion, and support activity.

items.title: Statewide expansion potential
items.body: A repeatable model that scales from West Palm Beach across Florida.

items.title: Compliance-aware roadmap
items.body: Regulated course delivery planned around Florida approval and licensing.

local.heading: Starting in West Palm Beach. Built for Florida statewide.
local.body: Florida Top 1 Driving School is being built from West Palm Beach with a statewide digital model: bilingual enrollment, online learning paths, permit preparation, student support, and future course delivery aligned with Florida requirements.
local.disclaimer: Compliance roadmap: Florida Top 1 Driving School is being developed with a compliance-aware roadmap. Any regulated course delivery will follow applicable Florida approval, licensing, and operating requirements before being offered as an official state-regulated course.

testimonials.heading: Built for real Florida drivers and families
testimonials.subheading: The platform is designed around the people it serves — first-time drivers, parents, and Spanish-speaking users who want a clear, modern experience.

items.quote: I wasn't sure where to start with my permit. A guided path like this would have made the whole process obvious.
As a parent, I want one place to see what my teen needs to complete and how they're progressing.
Tener todo el proceso explicado en español, en un solo lugar, cambia completamente la experiencia.

finalCta.heading: See the platform vision for Florida driver education.
finalCta.body: Explore the demo, request an investor overview, or reach the team building Florida's bilingual online driving school.
